'''hanulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qirat|qirat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qirat|qirat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hanulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænilith|hænilith]] || [[word:hænilij|hænilij]] || [[word:hænilish|hænilish]] || [[word:hænili|hænili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanunuluth|hanunuluth]] || [[word:hanunuluj|hanunuluj]] || [[word:hanunulush|hanunulush]] || [[word:hanunulu|hanunulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanuluth|hanuluth]] || [[word:hanuluj|hanuluj]] || [[word:hanulush|hanulush]] || [[word:hanulu|hanulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanufluth|hanufluth]] || [[word:hanufluj|hanufluj]] || [[word:hanuflush|hanuflush]] || [[word:hanufluf|hanufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanuluthu|hanuluthu]] || [[word:hanuluju|hanuluju]] || [[word:hanulushu|hanulushu]] || [[word:hanuluku|hanuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanuluth|hanuluth]] || [[word:hanuluj|hanuluj]] || [[word:hanulush|hanulush]] || [[word:hanulu|hanulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanuluthul|hanuluthul]] || [[word:hanulujul|hanulujul]] || [[word:hanulushul|hanulushul]] || [[word:hanulukul|hanulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanuluthuthu|hanuluthuthu]] || [[word:hanulujuju|hanulujuju]] || [[word:hanulushushu|hanulushushu]] || [[word:hanuluku|hanuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanuluthun|hanuluthun]] || [[word:hanulujun|hanulujun]] || [[word:hanulushun|hanulushun]] || [[word:hanulukun|hanulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanuluthuoro|hanuluthuoro]] || [[word:hanulujuoro|hanulujuoro]] || [[word:hanulushuoro|hanulushuoro]] || [[word:hanulukuoro|hanulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
